revision.comment: Keep the offending pages out of [[Special:WantedTemplates]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{documentation|content=This template is used by [[Template:NDLDC]] to track when the id has a non-numeric character. To find non-numeric characters in the id parameter, look for transclusions in [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:NDLDC/PIDBAD]]}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{documentation|content=This template is used by [[Template:NDLDC]] to track when the id has a non-numeric character. To find non-numeric characters in the id parameter, look for transclusions in [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:NDLDC/PIDBAD]]}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{documentation|content=This template is used by [[Template:NDLDC]] to track when the id has a non-numeric character. To find non-numeric characters in the id parameter, look for transclusions in [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:NDLDC/PIDBAD]]}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <noinclude>{{documentation|content=This template is used by [[Template:NDLDC]] to track when the id has a non-numeric character. To find non-numeric characters in the id parameter, look for transclusions in [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:NDLDC/PIDBAD]]}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{documentation|content=This template is used by [[Template:NDLDC]] to track when the id has a non-numeric character. To find non-numeric characters in the id parameter, look for transclusions in [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:NDLDC/PIDBAD]]}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{documentation|content=This template is used by [[Template:NDLDC]] to track when the id has a non-numeric character. To find non-numeric characters in the id parameter, look for transclusions in [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:NDLDC/PIDBAD]]}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
